boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate telemetry service after prerequisite calibration evidence is attached to the activation packet?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact match of device group, site, release condition, and timing required per STD-ACR-022-P
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-ACR-022-P requires full match; shared prefixes not enough
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Shared DG-41B prefix noted but insufficient alone; timing match unconfirmed in sources
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Calibration attached before 2026-06-16 but exact timing and group distinction open

final_answer: ESCALATE. Source records show calibration CAL-ACR-022 attached for DG-41B at Site 18-P under RC-7, matching activation ACT-ACR-2026-8022 per ACT-ACR-022 and RC-ACR-022. However STD-ACR-022-P requires confirmed exact match on all four elements including timing; shared prefix note leaves narrow defect open. Action boundary remains open.
